name: Wall Hook Brass - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Keep your home organized with this Wall Hook Brass from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of metal with a brass finish, this hook boasts a circular mounting plate with a concentric ring design for a classic look. It features an upper arm extending outwards and a lower curved arm to hang a variety of items, and it comes with two screws and wall plugs for easy installation.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
